column8: I don't want to buy that CD, so I'm not going to.
column9: I don't live alone, so I don't get lonely.
column10: Don's got such a lot of homework that he's not going to play football tonight.
column11: I can't swim, so I'm not going scuba diving with Terry.
column12: We're not going to order a pizza because we don't have enough money.
column13: We're not staying in the same hotel, so we can't share a room.
column14: I'm not you, but I think you should call Antony right now!
column15: I can't come because I have to help my dad with something.
column16: I don't go to bed as late as you, so I'm able to get up early in the morning.
